fact-2.expected: Plants use sunlight, water and CO2 in chloroplasts (chlorophyll) to produce glucose and oxygen.

fact-3.expected: TCP: connection-oriented, reliable, ordered. UDP: connectionless, no delivery guarantee, lower latency.

fact-5.expected: The value of the best alternative forgone when making a choice; example acceptable.

fact-6.expected: Earth's axial tilt (~23.5°) changes how directly sunlight hits each hemisphere during its orbit; NOT distance from the sun.

fact-7.expected: Not Found — the server cannot find the requested resource/URL.

fact-8.expected: Function mapping arbitrary input to fixed-size output deterministically; uses: hash tables, integrity checks, password storage.

summ-1.expected: One sentence covering: EV adoption grew (cheap batteries/incentives) but charging & battery-production concerns remain; solid-state research underway. MUST be 1 sentence.

summ-2.expected: Council approved transit budget: rail expansion, e-buses, bike lanes; critics cite roads. MUST be <=20 words.

summ-3.expected: Graphene-oxide filtration removes 99% heavy metals/microplastics with ~40% less energy; field trials planned.

summ-4.expected: Two sentences: remote work raised office vacancies driving conversions; suburban co-working thrives, demand to settle at 70-80% of 2019. MUST be 2 sentences.

summ-5.expected: One sentence: volcano erupted, ~8000 evacuated, flights suspended, weeks of activity possible. MUST be 1 sentence.

summ-6.expected: Walking 7000+ steps/day halves early-death risk vs <4000. MUST be <=15 words.

summ-7.expected: One sentence: 4th-gen smartwatch with glucose sensor, 10-day battery; ships November from $399.

summ-8.expected: One sentence: droughts in Brazil/Vietnam pushed coffee to 15-year high (+20% retail), elevated for 2 seasons.
